title: Architect/Full Stack Developer

title: Architect Front-end Developer
description: Orchestrated and optimized front-end codebase by leveraging React, TypeScript, Redux, Formik, Zod, TanStack Query, Bootstrap, and Storybook.
Delivered UI implementations on schedule and collaborated with back-end developers and UX designers to align technical solutions across teams.

Enhanced user experience for applications serving 1M+ daily active users.
